Thus verdict = ALLOW. Reason: citing source ID(s) that indicate hazmat classification matches route waiver (SRC-CASE-DE7B275DBC4F-SRC) and visible decision fields confirm hazmat-approved route classes (SRC-CASE-DE7B275DBC4F-FLD).
